description.value:
A compact wrist-mounted sling device, leaving the hands free while providing a concealed ranged attack option. Its surprising nature can catch enemies off guard.

Basic: Two-Handed, Ranged d4 (40/160), Disarm, Hipshot

rmeData.masterPerk: When you score a mighty blow, your enemy loses its reaction until the start of its next turn. If you score a powerful blow, this effect applies, as well as all attacks against this enemy gain advantage until the end of your next turn. On a critical hit, these effects both apply.
